evals.prompt: Create a skill for the webhook retry pattern I keep using — exponential backoff with jitter, idempotency check, and dead letter queue after 3 failures
expectations: Should follow A.U.D.N. lifecycle — search existing skills before creating
Should extract the retry mechanism, not the specific webhook URL or payload
Should parameterize backoff values and max retries
Should classify as capability-uplift or encoded-preference

evals.prompt: Save this debugging workflow as a reusable skill — I always check pipeline throughput, then batch health, then stale data, then error rates
expectations: Should recognize the 4-step diagnostic pattern as the mechanism
Should create a parameterized template with configurable check targets
Should write evals for the new skill

evals.prompt: Test the council skill — run its evals and tell me the pass rate
expectations: Should locate council skill's evals directory
Should run eval infrastructure against the skill
Should report pass rate and any failures

evals.prompt: Audit this external skill from GitHub and merge the best patterns into our version
expectations: Should NOT trigger skill-creator — this is skill-auditor-merger territory
Should recognize audit+merge as a different workflow from create+test

evals.prompt: Fix the bug in the fleet-ops-debugger skill where it misses stuck-as-loaded fleets
expectations: Should NOT trigger skill-creator — this is a bug fix in an existing skill
Should recognize editing existing code vs creating a new skill
